CustomField.description: Area(s) of interest selected by the partner organization or individual on the partner intake form. Multi-select to match the form's checkbox UX. Values match Lead.Partnership_Interest__c exactly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Captures the checkbox selections from the partner intake form. Mapped 1:1 to Lead.Partnership_Interest__c when the Form Submission Intake Router creates the Partner Lead.
CustomField.label: Partner Interest Type

value.fullName: Offering an internship to an athlete
value.label: Offering an internship to an athlete

value.fullName: How my company can work with CPL
value.label: How my company can work with CPL
